name: Import-PSSession

options.name: -AllowClobber
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet imports the specified commands, even if they have the same names as commands in the current session.

name: -ArgumentList
-Args
options.description: Specifies an array of commands that results from using the specified arguments (parameter values).

options.name: -Certificate
options.description: Specifies the client certificate that is used to sign the format files (*.Format.ps1xml) or script module files (.psm1) in the temporary module that `Import-PSSession` creates.

name: -CommandName
-Name
options.description: Specifies commands with the specified names or name patterns. Wildcards are permitted. Use CommandName or its alias, Name .

name: -CommandType
-Type
options.description: Specifies the type of command objects. The default value is Cmdlet. Use CommandType or its alias, Type . The acceptable values for this parameter are:

options.name: -DisableNameChecking
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet suppresses the message that warns you when you import a cmdlet or function whose name includes an unapproved verb or a prohibited character.

options.name: -FormatTypeName
options.description: Specifies formatting instructions for the specified Microsoft .NET Framework types. Enter the type names. Wildcards are permitted.

options.name: -FullyQualifiedModule
options.description: The value can be a module name, a full module specification, or a path to a module file.

name: -Module
-PSSnapin
options.description: Specifies and array of commands in the Windows PowerShell snap-ins and modules. Enter the snap-in and module names. Wildcards are not permitted.

options.name: -Prefix
options.description: Specifies a prefix to the nouns in the names of imported commands.

options.name: -Session
options.description: Specifies the PSSession from which the cmdlets are imported. Enter a variable that contains a session object or a command that gets a session object, such as a `New-PSSession` or `Get-PSSession` command. You can specify only one session. This parameter is required.

description: Imports commands from another session into the current session.
